description: Validation pass rate (created proposals vs proposal_creation_rejected events) is at least 0.7 over a recent window. The window decouples this gate from volatile live-queue state — accepted/rejected proposals get cleaned out post-decision while rejection events accumulate for the lifetime of the stash, so a lifetime ratio collapses to 0/(0+N)=0 once any rejection burst happens. Set `since: null` to opt back into lifetime mode. Skipped when no proposal traffic is recorded.
